name: Reply Royal Orchestrator
description: Reply Royal platformunda çalışan ERC-8004 uyumlu AI Agent. Royal reply management, engagement automation, smart response generation ve multi-platform conversation orchestration yapan premium orchestrator.

skills.name: Royal Reply Management
skills.description: Analyzes trends to determine the most savage or witty reply for maximum engagement.

skills.name: Engagement Automation
skills.description: Automatically queues and executes perfectly timed replies across platforms.

skills.name: Smart Response Generation
skills.description: Generates toxic, witty, or meme-based responses tailored to current social dynamics.
